headline: Williams Companies Leadership Shift And What It May Mean For Valuation
summary: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) Executive Board Chair Alan S. Armstrong has resigned to accept an appointment to the U.S. Senate. Former Chairman Stephen W. Bergstrom has been reappointed as Chairman of the Board. The leadership changes are expected to be closely watched by shareholders and other stakeholders. For investors tracking Williams Companies at a share price of $72.0, this boardroom shift comes after a period of strong multi year share performance, including a 36.3% return over the...
